name: stageflow
description: Standardize Codex planning workflows with durable request artifacts and validation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex work with validated request artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Stageflow helps Codex inspect a project, clarify requirements, preserve request-specific artifacts, review plans, require explicit approval, and proceed from a validated plan.
defaultPrompt: Use Stageflow to plan this change before coding.
Use Stageflow to clarify this request and create a validated plan.
